steps.title: Identify Reyes and Chen's core criticism
steps.content: The key signal is Reyes and Chen's argument that the detected elements could come from multiple sources beyond Earth-like continental crusts; the conclusion in Text 1 doesn't adequately consider these alternatives.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the characterization
steps.content: Reyes and Chen would likely view the conclusion in Text 1 as questionable because it relies heavily on atmospheric traces of individual elements without fully considering alternative minerals or rock types that could also contain those elements. That matches Choice C — As questionable, because it rests on an incomplete consideration of potential sources of the elements detected in white dwarf atmospheres.
